## Services

| Layer | Service | Port | Public? |

| BFF | buildmart-materials-bff | 8101 | Yes |
| BFF | buildmart-workers-bff | 8102 | Yes |
| BFF | buildmart-delivery-bff | 8103 | Yes |
| Core | buildmart-materials | 8001 | No (internal) |
| Core | buildmart-workers | 8002 | No (internal) |
| Core | buildmart-delivery | 8003 | No (internal) |

## Project columns (recommended)

| Column | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| **Backlog** | Planned work |

| **Done** | Shipped |
